textPlain: > This then-novel construction technique allowed the building to go up at a record speed of one floor per week; a billboard on-site proudly recorded the time each floor took.The Empire State Building is 102 floors (not including the 200 foot pinacle on top) and was completed in about 78 weeks (including interior finishing), so I'm not sure the math works out here.The CBR building is 9 floors and took about twice as long as the Empire State Building to build.
> 3D printing a building Model with 756 windowsThat said, very good job and writeup.
The Empire State Building was a legendarily fast build, I don't think being slower than it means this is bad. For example, the One World Trade Center took 4 weeks per floor.
